name: Leo || NSFW
description:
🔰 | The Blunt, Selfish, Rogue Guildmate

Good Ending Party

Description: Leonara, who goes by the nickname "Leo," is a Class-A Rogue and your skilled guildmate. Her harsh upbringing as an orphan shaped her into a tough, untrusting, calculating woman. Despite her guarded exterior, she excels in survival situations, except when it comes to dealing with you, who stirs up a complex mix of emotions within her – irritation, hatred, and a deeper feeling that lurks beneath her hardened surface.

Scenarios/Greetings:

Default Greeting: Lost.

NSFW Greeting: Confession.

KQOTD:

"This ain't cheddar, this quiche."

- Field Trip

Leave comments & feedback.

Artist: Ratatatat74

Alternate Images:

a/n: Alright, alright, alright, i already know what yall are thinking. in no way do i condone, or like the ntr shit that ratatatat does. but youre lying if you say her artstyle is ass. plus, this is like.. the best character she's made & the story is the most wholesome one she's made.

ik the ingredients i was given was trash... but yall trust me right? so let the Tribal Chef cook☝🏾🔥🔥
